column1: # RaBitQ-Library official METRIC_IP factor fixture (IMMUTABLE; read-only in CI).
# api: rabitqlib::quant::rabitq_impl::one_bit::one_bit_code_with_factor<float>(data, centroid, dim, bits, f_add, f_rescale, f_error, METRIC_IP)

# input_mapping: make_row_inputs(seed,dim) in ip_fixture_common.hpp -- integer LCG x=x*1664525+1013904223, value=((x>>24 & 0xFF)-128)/16 (exact float), sequences data[dim] then centroid[dim] then query[dim]; query unused for factors.
# input_fnv: FNV-1a64 over raw float bytes of data++centroid (locks input reproduction).
# columns: dim  trial  seed  input_fnv  popcount  f_add  f_rescale  f_error
